---
title: "Graph Neural Network for Molecular Property Prediction (QM9)"
date: 2026-04-29
categories: [GDL]
---

{{< include README.qmd >}}

---

- [Project Notebook (Code)](https://github.com/shreeshb51/shreeshb51.github.io/blob/main/projects/Graph%20Neural%20Network%20for%20Molecular%20Property%20Prediction%20(QM9)/project_2_gnn_pipeline_for_qm9_data_prediction.ipynb)

- [Solving an Anchor Example]()

---
